name: Fresh Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Two hours before serving, combine the Caesar salad dressing and cottage cheese in a bowl.
2. Prepare the fresh spinach by washing it thoroughly, cutting out any large veins from the center of the leaves, and tearing them into desired size pieces.
3. Drain the spinach if necessary.
4. Pour the dressing over the prepared spinach and toss until evenly coated.
5. Serve immediately.
